sections.paragraph:
εὔσπλαγχνος, ον (s. prec. entry; in the mng. ‘with healthy intestines’: Hippocr., Prorrh. 2, 6; Hesych.) pert. to having tender feelings for someone, tenderhearted, compassionate (so Prayer of Manasseh [=Odes 12]: 7; TestZeb 9:7; JosAs ch. 13 cod. A [p. 57, 25 Bat. w. φιλάνθρωπος]; ApcEsdr 1:10 p. 25, 2 Tdf. [w. πολυέλεος, so also Cat. Cod. Astr. IX/2 p. 165, 4 of the goddess Selene]; ApcSed 15:1 [w. ἀναμάρτητος]; PGM 12, 283; Just., D. 108, 3) of God (as in the pass. already given) w. ἐπιεικής 1 Cl 29:1.—Of humans (TestSim 4:4; Syntipas p. 106, 23; Leontios 46 p. 99, 15; Nicetas Eugen. 6, 193 H.) 54:1. (W. φιλάδελφος, ταπεινόφρων) 1 Pt 3:8. W. numerous other qualifications: of deacons Pol 5:2 and elders 6:1 (for the mng. good-hearted in 1 Pt 3:8 and Pol 6:1 s. ESelwyn, First Peter ’46, 188f). εὔ. εἴς τινα toward someone Eph 4:32.—DELG s.v. σπλήν. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

TestZeb TestZeb = Testament of Zebulon, s. Test12Patr—List 2

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

  1. ch. = chapter(s)

Bat. Bat. = PBatiffol, s. JosAs—List 5

ApcEsdr ApcEsdr = Apocalypse of Esdras—List 2

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

ApcSed ApcSed = Apocalypse of Sedrach—List 2

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

TestSim TestSim = Testament of Simeon, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Syntipas Syntipas , a collection of fables under the name of Syntapis; before XI a.d.—List 5

Nicetas Eugen Nicetas Eugen , XII a.d.—List 5

  1. H. = FHort, s. W-H.—List 1, beg.

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 413
